---
name: 'Good first issue'
about: Easy tasks to help new contributors get started
title: 'Good first issue: [short description]'
labels: ['good first issue']
assignees: []
---

Describe the task clearly and include step-by-step reproduction or setup instructions. Provide links to relevant files and suggested next steps.

Acceptance criteria:
- Clear description of the expected change
- Steps to verify locally
- Suggested PR title and description template
